summary: Tested all 5 features for the unified PartnerOrgForm refactor. All features verified PASS via Playwright browser automation with visual screenshot confirmation.
critical_code_review_comments: PartnerOrgForm.tsx: Clean shared component, compact mode with icons for public signup, label mode for admin dialog. Schema-driven field visibility (base_currency, address) works correctly.

TenantsTab.tsx: Old sub-tabs (Partner Types, Industries, Tags) fully removed. New Partner Org dialog uses PartnerOrgForm with testIdPrefix='new-partner'. All expected fields present with correct data-testids.
Signup.tsx (partner mode): Uses PartnerOrgForm compact=true with testIdPrefix='partner'. Correct fields: org-name, admin-name, admin-email, admin-password, base-currency, addr-line1 all visible.

WebsiteAuthSection.tsx: 'Partner Sign-Up Page' AuthTile (testId='auth-tile-partner-signup') correctly placed in AUTHENTICATION section. Slide contains FormSchemaBuilder with 6 fields (Org Name locked, Admin Full Name locked, Admin Email locked, Password locked, Base Currency, Organization Address). Locked fields note displayed.
PlansTab.tsx: RULE_FIELDS array correctly contains only [partner_code, country, base_currency, name]. partner_type/industry/tags removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_168: All 5 features of the PartnerOrgForm unification fully verified. (1) Partner Orgs page: No sub-tabs at all (Partner Types, Industries, Tags removed), only partner list + New Partner Org button - PASS. (2) New Partner Org dialog: Shows Organization Name, Admin Account (Full name, Email, Password), Base Currency, Organization Address - no partner_type/industry/tags - PASS. (3) Public /signup?type=partner: Shows compact PartnerOrgForm with icon-prefixed inputs (org-name, admin-name, admin-email, admin-password, base-currency, address) - no bad fields - PASS. (4) Auth & Pages: Partner Sign-Up Page tile appears in AUTHENTICATION section (alongside Login, Sign Up, Verify Email). Clicking opens slideover with FormSchemaBuilder showing 6 fields (4 locked: Org Name, Admin Name, Email, Password; 2 optional: Base Currency, Address) - PASS. (5) Plans > License Plans > visibility rules: Only Partner Code, Country, Base Currency, Org Name available as field options - NO partner_type/industry/tags - PASS.

test_features_verified.partner_orgs_no_subtabs: PASS: No Partner Types, Industries, Tags sub-tabs on Partner Orgs page
test_features_verified.partner_orgs_list_visible: PASS: Partner Organizations heading + 0 organizations count shown
test_features_verified.new_partner_dialog_fields: PASS: All PartnerOrgForm fields (new-partner-org-name, new-partner-admin-name, new-partner-admin-email, new-partner-admin-password, new-partner-base-currency, new-partner-addr-line1) found in dialog
test_features_verified.new_partner_dialog_no_bad_fields: PASS: partner_type/industry/tags/Partner Type/Industry/Tags NOT in dialog
test_features_verified.new_partner_dialog_sections: PASS: ADMIN ACCOUNT and ORGANIZATION ADDRESS sections visible in dialog
test_features_verified.public_signup_compact_fields: PASS: All 6 compact PartnerOrgForm fields found (org-name, admin-name, admin-email, admin-password, base-currency, addr-line1)
test_features_verified.public_signup_no_bad_fields: PASS: partner_type/industry/tags NOT on public partner signup page
test_features_verified.auth_pages_partner_tile: PASS: data-testid='auth-tile-partner-signup' tile found in Auth & Pages AUTHENTICATION section
test_features_verified.auth_pages_tile_description: PASS: Tile shows 'Partner registration form · 6 fields'
test_features_verified.auth_pages_slide_opens: PASS: SlideOver opens when tile clicked
test_features_verified.auth_pages_slide_form_schema_builder: PASS: FormSchemaBuilder with 6 fields displayed (4 locked + Currency + Address)
test_features_verified.auth_pages_slide_locked_notice: PASS: Locked fields notice shown in slide
test_features_verified.plans_rule_fields_correct: PASS: Visibility rules dropdown shows Partner Code, Country, Base Currency, Org Name only
test_features_verified.plans_rule_no_bad_fields: PASS: partner_type/industry/tags NOT in visibility rules dropdown
